'''Finn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[TIE pilot|pilot]] who was attached to [[Crimson Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Crimson Squadron]] when it was stationed on [[Cilpar]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="XWING" />

He was killed shortly before the arrival of [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]], who was operating in an undercover role, in the squadron, shot by a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt to the thorax. All that was ever found of him were his head and feet. His life-support helmet was given to Tycho, as he did not have one of his own to use.<ref name="XWING" />

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 2]] {{1stm}}
